# Discover

Essays and explainers will collect here as the archive grows: how visual rock
identification works (and where it fails), what specific formation processes look like
in hand samples, how rocks are dated, and how materials like these have been used by
people.

Nothing is published here until it is grounded in the collection's actual specimens
and cited sources — so this section starts small on purpose.
